case_title: HARLEY-DAVIDSON CREDIT, A NEVADA CORPORATION VS. JOSEPH M. DOWD et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-23-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
